data.title: Biodance Announces Its 'Last Chance Spring Sale,' With Up to 30% Off Viral Hydrogel Products
data.description: Biodance, a top Korean beauty brand known for its groundbreaking hydrogel masks, has introduced new Jelly Serum Mists and Eye Patches alongside their popular Hydrogel Masks. The company, based in SEOUL, South Korea, has recently announced a 'Last Chance Spring Sale' beginning on March 31, 2026. This sale comes after the tremendous success of their skincare products in the market.

data.title: Foremost Clean Energy Closes Bought Deal Private Placement for Aggregate Gross Proceeds of C$5.7 Million
data.description: This press release is specifically for distribution in Canada and should not be shared with or distributed to news wire services in the United States.

data.title: New Data Based on Actual Customer Premiums Shows Auto Insurance Costs Easing
data.description: In Huntington Beach, California, on March 31, 2026, a recent report by Freeway Insurance revealed that customers in certain states are now experiencing a decrease in auto insurance expenses following years of continuous rise. This positive trend indicates a shift in the insurance market, contrasting with previous industry analyses which have shown consistent upticks in costs for drivers. This development signifies a potential relief for Freeway customers, suggesting a gradual stabilization in auto insurance rates in some regions.

data.title: Keith Sweat Brings an Uplifting Family Film 'The Secret Between Us' to AMC Theaters This Easter Weekend
data.description: This Easter weekend in Los Angeles, on March 31, 2026, families are encouraged to come together and enjoy a new family movie titled "The Secret Between Us" produced by Hidden Gem Entertainment. The film features renowned actors including Michael Jai White, Lisa Arrindell, Victoria Rowell, and Tre Ryan. It is both written and directed by talented individuals.

data.title: M2 Group Strengthens Civil Engineering Leadership with Appointment of 30-Year Industry Veteran Brenda Shackleford
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on March 31, 2026, M2 Group (M2), a consulting firm focusing on land development in the Southeast and Midwest, has bolstered its project team by bringing on Brenda Shackleford, PE, as the new civil engineering manager. This move is part of M2's efforts to enhance communities in the region.

data.title: Correction: Notice to convene the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of Aktsiaselts Tallinna Vesi
data.description: The correct version is: The list of shareholders entitled to vote at the General Meeting will be established 7 days prior to the General Meeting, i.e., as of 16 April 2026 at the close of the business day of the Nasdaq CSD Estonia’s settlement system.

data.title: Kartoon Studios Provides Business Update
data.description: The CEO and CFO unveiled a revolutionary AI-animated earnings update during an exclusive interview with iconic characters like A.A. Milne's Winnie the Pooh. This innovative approach to financial reporting showcases a forward-thinking strategy aimed at engaging a wider audience. Through this unique collaboration, they aim to reach a new demographic and enhance investor relations. The discussion provided key financial insights, with revenue projections exceeding $X million for the upcoming quarter. This unconventional method of presenting financial information marks a significant shift in corporate communication strategies.

data.title: IANS Launches News Offering and Reinvents Its Platform for How Security Leaders Work Today
data.description: In Boston on March 31, 2026, IANS unveiled a new connected experience providing security leaders with up-to-date news, daily guidance from practitioners, and proven recommendations to address current security challenges. This platform aims to assist leaders in making informed decisions in today's ever-evolving security environment.
Russian Baltic oil exports drop to 4-year low on drone strikes.

data.title: Why Banks Are Looking At Cardano Midnight Instead Of Ethereum And Solana
data.description: Financial institutions are looking into Cardano's Midnight partner chain for institutional blockchain infrastructure due to its unique features that Ethereum and Solana lack, such as programmable privacy and front-running protection. While Ethereum and Solana struggle to meet the needs of banks in terms of privacy, execution predictability, and compliance tooling, Cardano's Midnight partner chain offers solutions to these challenges. Banks require blockchain technology that allows for selective disclosure of privacy, ensures execution predictability without MEV extraction, and provides compliance tooling without revealing sensitive information to the public. The transparency of public chains like Ethereum and Solana does not align with the privacy requirements of banks, as they need to protect customer transactions from public view while still proving compliance to regulators. For more information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: FutureFuel Redirects Capital to Growth Investments and Share Repurchases
data.description: BATESVILLE, Ark., March 31, 2026 - FutureFuel Corp. disclosed today that its Board of Directors has decided to lower the quarterly dividend to $0.01 per share for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend, announced with a record date of June 4, 2026, and a payment date of June 18, 2026, is part of a strategic move by the company to allocate resources towards expansion initiatives and buyback shares when advantageous.

data.title: Onconetix Appoints David White as Chief Executive Officer and Sammy Dorf as Member of the Board of Directors
data.description: A highly skilled leadership team is ready to finalize the acquisition of Realbotix LLC. This acquisition promises to bring significant changes and benefits to the company. The experienced team is poised to drive long-term value for shareholders through this transformative opportunity.

data.title: Aether Holdings Forms Joint Venture with OORT to Build a Foundational Data Infrastructure for Financial AI
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Aether Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: ATHR) revealed the establishment of Aether DataHub, LLC in collaboration with OORTech Inc. (OORT). Aether, a financial technology holding company, focuses on creating data-driven platforms and media assets for investors. Aether DataHub operates as a joint venture aimed at leveraging OORTech's expertise in decentralized artificial intelligence (AI) data cloud services. OORTech is known for offering a community-powered platform for extensive data gathering, labeling, and verification, contributing to a global scale of service provision.

data.title: GMEX Robotics Advances Development of Intelligent Robot Chassis
data.description: In Sydney, Australia on March 31, 2026, GMEX Robotics Corporation (NASDAQ: GMEX) shared that they are progressing with the development and incorporation of their Intelligent Robot Chassis, a significant innovation aimed at boosting the durability, movement, and operational security of self-governing robots in various sectors. Concurrently, GMEX is working towards obtaining intellectual property rights in strategic regions like Southeast Asia, China, Australia, and the United States, as a vital aspect of their overall technology approach.

data.title: Standard Chartered predicts stablecoin market to hit $2 trillion as turnovers double in 2 years with rising AI payments and traditional finance use.
data.description: Over the last two years, the turnover of stablecoins has increased twofold as their adoption in AI payments and traditional finance continues to expand. Despite this, Standard Chartered projects that the market will eventually reach $2 trillion.
